project_type: Java CDK infrastructure-as-code project for a sleep audio processing pipeline
build_system: Maven 3.9.10. Proxy configured in ~/.m2/settings.xml for COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network. Surefire plugin clears NODE_OPTIONS for Jsii compatibility.
test_framework: JUnit 5 with CDK assertions (Template.fromStack pattern). Tests in src/test/java/com/myorg/. CDK assertions library is bundled in aws-cdk-lib.
build_command: cd /projects/sandbox/cdk-sleep-java-kiro && eval "$(mise activate bash)" && mise use java@17 && mvn compile
test_command: cd /projects/sandbox/cdk-sleep-java-kiro && eval "$(mise activate bash)" && mise use java@17 && mvn test
verification_instructions: 1. Run 'mvn test' to execute all CDK assertion tests. 2. Run 'NODE_OPTIONS= cdk synth' to verify CloudFormation template synthesizes. 3. Verify ARCHITECTURE.md Mermaid diagram reflects implemented resources.
setup_instructions: 1. mise use java@17 (already configured). 2. ~/.m2/settings.xml has proxy config. 3. CDK CLI installed globally. 4. Unset NODE_OPTIONS before running cdk commands.
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode - Maven Central accessible via HTTP proxy. NODE_OPTIONS must be unset for cdk synth/CLI. Java 17 via mise. No Docker daemon needed for this task.
contribution_requirements: 1. Strict TDD: write failing tests FIRST, then implement minimal code. 2. Conventional commits (feat:, fix:, docs:). 3. ARCHITECTURE.md must stay in sync with implemented constructs. 4. Use L2 constructs. 5. Least-privilege IAM.
key_patterns: CdkBaseStack is the main stack in com.myorg. CdkBaseApp entry point. Tests use Template.fromStack(stack) then template.hasResourceProperties(). CDK version [2.255.0,3.0.0). EventBridge rule already exists with CloudWatch LogGroup target - needs to be changed to target the new state machine. S3 input/output buckets already exist.
directory_structure: src/main/java/com/myorg/ - CDK app and stack definitions. src/test/java/com/myorg/ - JUnit 5 CDK assertion tests. Root has ARCHITECTURE.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, pom.xml, cdk.json.
